name: Paragon Banking Group PLC
description: Paragon Banking Group PLC is a UK-based specialist banking group that provides a range of financial services, including mortgage lending, commercial lending, and retail savings products. The company focuses on supporting the ambitions of individuals and businesses across the UK through a robust, low-risk business model. By leveraging specialist expertise, Paragon delivers sustainable growth and shareholder returns while maintaining a commitment to responsible business practices and sustainability. The group operates primarily through its subsidiary, Paragon Bank PLC, offering tailored financial solutions designed to meet the unique needs of its diverse customer base.
